scripts.preview: bun run build:preview && vite preview -c vite.preview.ts
scripts.build:extension: ENTRY=extension vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts && ENTRY=injected vite build -c extension/vite.config.ts
scripts.package:extension: bun run build:extension && cd extension/dist && zip --recurse-paths ../../extension.zip *
scripts.pre: bun run lint && bun run check && bun run build && bun run test
